name: Marbella

hero.alt: Marbella coastline at sunrise with La Concha mountain
hero.lead: A mature year-round market with beaches, established services and very different residential settings within one municipality.

seo.title: Marbella Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Marbella's lifestyle, property prices and selected new developments with Nueva Living's practical area guide.

intro.headlineHtml: A place that works beyond the summer
paragraphs: Marbella works for both full-time living and longer stays, but the micro-location matters. Marbella East is quieter and more residential, the Golden Mile prioritises access to the centre and Puerto Banus, and the hills trade walkability for privacy and views.

highlights: Best For
Buyers who want an established international base with year-round services.
Choose the Micro-location
Beachside, town, golf and hillside homes offer very different daily routines.
Daily Life
International schools, private healthcare, shopping and restaurants support longer stays.
Access
Central Marbella is typically around 40 to 45 minutes from Malaga Airport by car.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. New developments and prime micro-locations can sit above the municipal average.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Marbella.

name: Estepona

hero.alt: Estepona old town street with white houses and flower pots
hero.lead: A walkable town, long seafront and strong new-build supply, with a calmer pace than central Marbella.

seo.title: Estepona Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Estepona's lifestyle, property prices and selected new developments with Nueva Living's practical area guide.

paragraphs: The main choice is between the walkable town centre, beachside communities and the New Golden Mile. The latter offers newer residential projects between Estepona and Marbella, but daily life is generally more car-dependent.

highlights: Best For
Buyers seeking a practical coastal base with more value range than central Marbella.
Town or New Golden Mile
The centre offers walkability; newer coastal communities offer pools, space and managed grounds.
Daily Life
The old town, promenade, schools, healthcare and shops remain active throughout the year.
Access
The A-7 connects Estepona with Marbella, Gibraltar and Malaga Airport; journey times vary with traffic.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. Beachside and newly built homes may be priced above the local average.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Estepona and the New Golden Mile.

name: Benahavís

hero.alt: Benahavis mountain village and elevated hillside landscape
hero.lead: A low-density hillside market centred on privacy, golf, space and gated residential communities.

seo.title: Benahavis Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Benahavis lifestyle, property prices and selected villas and new developments with Nueva Living.

intro.headlineHtml: A quieter setting, still close to Marbella
paragraphs: Benahavis is not one single residential centre. La Quinta, Los Arqueros, Los Flamingos and the more secluded estates each offer a different balance of driving time, elevation, views and security. A car is essential in most communities.

highlights: Best For
Buyers prioritising privacy, security, golf and larger indoor-outdoor spaces.
Important Trade-off
Most homes require a car, and access times differ considerably between communities.
Property Profile
Villas and elevated apartments often offer larger terraces, pools and open views.
Location Choice
La Quinta is closer to Nueva Andalucia; higher and western communities feel more secluded.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. Values vary considerably between communities and prime villa estates.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Benahavis.

name: Nueva Andalucía

hero.alt: Puerto Banus marina and La Concha near Nueva Andalucia
hero.lead: An established residential area close to Puerto Banus, built around golf, services and easy second-home living.

seo.title: Nueva Andalucia Area Guide & New Developments | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Nueva Andalucia and Golf Valley lifestyle, property prices and selected new developments with Nueva Living.

paragraphs: Nueva Andalucia ranges from walkable pockets near local services to quieter, elevated parts of Golf Valley. Proximity to Puerto Banus is a major advantage, while traffic, views and walkability vary noticeably between streets and communities.

highlights: Best For
Second-home and full-time buyers who value convenience, golf and established services.
Golf Valley
Las Brisas, Aloha and Los Naranjos define the central residential landscape.
Lock-and-Leave
Many apartment and townhouse communities include managed grounds, pools and security.
Check the Exact Address
Walkability, road noise, views and traffic exposure can change within a short distance.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price average for resale homes in June 2026. Aloha, frontline golf and newly built homes can differ materially.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Nueva Andalucia and Golf Valley.

name: Mijas & Fuengirola

hero.alt: Fuengirola seafront with palms and Mediterranean water
hero.lead: Two distinct coastal markets offering beaches, established services and easier access towards Malaga.

seo.title: Mijas & Fuengirola Area Guide | Nueva Living
seo.description: Explore Mijas and Fuengirola lifestyle, property prices and new-development opportunities with Nueva Living.

intro.headlineHtml: More choice, easy access and daily convenience
paragraphs: Fuengirola is urban, walkable and rail-connected. Mijas ranges from the village and La Cala to golf and hillside communities, where a car is usually needed. The right choice depends more on the exact setting than the municipality name.

highlights: Best For
Buyers prioritising everyday convenience, transport links and a broader price range.
Fuengirola
Best suited to buyers wanting a walkable town, long seafront and rail access to Malaga Airport.
Mijas
La Cala, Mijas Pueblo and the inland golf communities offer very different lifestyles and access.
Property Choice
Urban apartments, coastal townhouses and hillside villas cover a wider range of needs.
priceNote: Indicative asking-price averages for resale homes in June 2026. Values vary between the town centres, La Cala, the seafront and hillside communities.
formMessage: I would like to receive current new-development options, prices and availability in Mijas and Fuengirola.
